structurePatterns: Horizontal rules ONLY between rows — NO vertical lines, NO zebra stripes
Header cells = subhead style (13px, 500 weight), ink-secondary color
Data cells = body style (14px, 400 weight), ink-primary color
Numeric cells = right-aligned, mono font (JetBrains Mono)
Selected row = flat gray background (tier3-line), NOT blue
usageHints: Numbers right-aligned with mono font — essential for scanability
Status indicators = 6px dot + text, never colored pills or blocks
Sort indicator = subtle arrow, not accent blue unless active
Density matches input mode: touch = comfortable, pointer = standard
doNotInvent: Vertical grid lines — Aham tables are horizontal-only
Rounded table borders — tables are edge-to-edge within container
